title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Car Park
questions.text: Parents collecting students after the concert should use the back car park. The front gates will be closed because performers need that area for loading instruments onto the coach.
questions.question: What should parents do?

options.B: Collect students from a different area.
options.A: Park by the front gates as usual.
options.C: Help performers load the instruments safely.

questions.explanation: Parents are told to use the back car park.

questions.heading: Message from Nadia to Joe
questions.text: Joe, I’ve found a website with useful diagrams for our biology homework. Some words are difficult, but the pictures explain the process really clearly. I’ll send you the link.
questions.question: What does Nadia think about the website?

options.C: The pictures make it helpful despite difficult language.
options.A: The diagrams are too unclear to use.
options.B: The words are easier than the pictures.

questions.explanation: Nadia says the words are difficult but the pictures are clear.

questions.heading: School Book Swap
questions.text: Bring books you no longer want to the library by Thursday. On Friday, students who brought books can choose the same number of different books to take home.
questions.question: How does the book swap work?

options.A: Students exchange unwanted books for others.
options.B: Students buy new books from the library.
options.C: Students borrow books and return them Friday.

questions.explanation: Students bring unwanted books and choose different ones.

questions.heading: From: Mr Jones / Subject: Your application
questions.text: Your application for the photography course arrived after the first deadline. There are still places, but you must pay by Friday or your place will be offered to someone else.
questions.question: What does Mr Jones warn?

options.B: The place is not safe until payment is made.
options.A: The course has already become completely full.
options.C: The application missed every possible deadline.

questions.explanation: The student must pay by Friday to keep the place.

questions.heading: Museum Backpacks
questions.text: Backpacks must be carried by hand in the exhibition rooms, not worn on your back. This helps prevent visitors accidentally touching objects when rooms are crowded.
questions.question: Why should visitors carry backpacks by hand?

options.C: To avoid damaging things in the museum.
options.A: To make backpacks easier to search.
options.B: To stop the rooms becoming crowded.

questions.explanation: Carrying backpacks by hand reduces the chance of touching objects.
